title: Al-Ahli Saudi FC Defends AFC Champions League Elite Title
seoDescription: Al-Ahli Saudi FC secured a 1-0 victory over Machida Zelvia, successfully defending their AFC Champions League Elite crown.

blocks.content: In a nail-biting final, **Al-Ahli Saudi FC** successfully defended their AFC Champions League Elite crown last night. They edged past first-time finalists, Japan's Machida Zelvia, with a decisive 1-0 victory. ### Saudi Football Supremacy The solitary goal came in the 78th minute via a spectacular free-kick. This back-to-back championship further cements Saudi Arabia's growing dominance and massive investment in club football across the Asian continent.

blocks.caption: Al-Ahli reigns supreme in Asian club football.
